about_p1: Hi! I'm Sertaç, a software developer based in Istanbul.
about_p2: Professionally, I build full-stack projects in the Angular and NestJS ecosystem. But the fun part is — I don't stop when the workday ends. Exploring different technologies and building things from scratch on my own is a separate passion for me.
about_p3: As a concrete example of that curiosity: I built this portfolio site to learn SvelteKit, developed a full-stack CMS project with Angular and NestJS, and embarked on my biggest adventure yet — building my first mobile application with React Native. That app is OweMate: a full-featured personal finance tracker for managing debts, receivables, savings, and income, complete with live exchange rates for currencies and precious metals, due date notifications, and a freemium subscription model — built with React Native for mobile and Next.js for web.
about_p4: Taking a project from idea to app store as a solo developer — designing backend architecture, setting up infrastructure with Docker and Traefik on a VPS, writing CI/CD pipelines, and building a mobile app — all at the same time gives me a deep, end-to-end perspective on software development.
about_p5: TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, and CI/CD are my daily tools. Writing clean, maintainable, and well-designed software is my priority in every project.
